    descriptionGive the data chip to Kaalifax, an encryption expert. He should be working at the Recycle Station here in Durian.
    mustBeInorderNo
    minLvl0
    completeDescriptionKaalifax: “Ahh.. another problem to solve.. *squinting at the chip* ... I can see this is no ordinary data chip. How did you aquire it? But I guess that's not for me to ask.. However, I do require some kind of payment for this service. You see, I have a debt to pay to the mob, so I need you to recycle some stuff for me. If you do that I will help you.”
    addedBodies["nQ-ux_eFJkCqkVyZ7ocSlw"]
